entries.text: Dogs are animals that people often keep as pets. They are related to wolves but have lived with people for thousands of years. Dogs can be big or small and come in many colours and breeds.
Dogs have a very good sense of smell. They can smell things that people cannot. They also hear sounds that are too high for people to hear. Many dogs like to run, play, and be with their family.
question_hints: Do dogs hear better than us

entries.text: Dogs need food, fresh water, and a safe place to sleep. They also need walks and play time to stay healthy and happy. It is important to be gentle with dogs and not bother them when they eat or sleep.
question_hints: How to look after a dog
How to be safe with dogs

entries.text: Cats are furry pets that many people keep at home. They like to nap, play, and sometimes hunt. Cats can purr when they are happy. They need food, water, a litter box, and a safe place to rest.

Birds have feathers and wings. Most birds can fly. They lay eggs and have beaks instead of teeth. Birds live in many places: in trees, near water, or in your garden. Parrots and canaries are birds people keep as pets.
Fish live in water. They have fins and gills so they can swim and breathe under water. Fish lay eggs. Some fish live in the sea, some in rivers or lakes. Pet fish often live in a tank or bowl.

Elephants are very big animals. They have long trunks they use to drink, eat, and wash. They have big ears and thick skin. Elephants are plant-eaters and live in family groups. They are found in Africa and Asia.
question_hints: What does an elephant use its trunk for

entries.text: Butterflies are insects with colourful wings. They start as caterpillars, then form a chrysalis, and turn into a butterfly. This change is called metamorphosis. Butterflies like flowers and sunny places.
question_hints: How does a caterpillar become a butterfly

entries.text: Being kind to animals means giving them what they need and not hurting them. Pat pets gently, do not pull tails or ears, and never disturb an animal when it is eating or sleeping. If you are unsure, ask a grown-up.
question_hints: How to be kind to animals
Is it okay to pull a dog’s tail
How to be safe with pets
